sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Mallet Attack
special_mechanics.description: Bugs Bunny is armed with a mallet that he can swing at various enemies to defeat them, deflect certain projectiles, or destroy bricks

special_mechanics.name: Enemy Bounce
special_mechanics.description: Player can land on top of enemies without getting damaged

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. No technical physics documentation available in sources. Game is described as a mediocre mascot platformer with standard side-scrolling mechanics. No ROM addresses or precise movement values documented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Bugs Bunny Birthday Blowout
